tribe_description:
This tribe buys like operators who expect to own a small system, not “try a product.” They treat the product page as an implied contract—what arrives, what connects, what’s required to function—and they judge the purchase by whether it can be integrated into a repeatable household routine without a single fragile dependency turning the whole thing into waste. Their first read of quality isn’t aesthetics or even performance; it’s system integrity. Unboxing is an audit: if anything is missing, abnormal, empty, or nonsensical, they treat it as a concrete quality-control breach and they say so explicitly, because to them it predicts downstream failure rates.

Their core evaluation move is mechanism-first testing. They benchmark against a known reference (a prior tool, a professional standard, a familiar device) and will grant straightforward credit when results are “close enough” in normal conditions. But they don’t stop at “works/doesn’t work”: they hunt for the one repeatable behavior that breaks confidence and define its boundary conditions (when it shows up, what it does, and whether you can anticipate it). They don’t inflate that into generalized distrust unless the error is ungovernable or feels random; instead, they translate it into a targeted risk forecast so another buyer can predict whether their own routine will trigger the same failure mode.

Ownership survivability is a hard gate, especially around maintenance and servicing. They simulate real hand positions and real removal/swap steps and treat unsafe instructions, accidental-activation layouts during servicing, or immediate deformation under normal handling as decisive design failures—not “tight fit,” “learning curve,” or “minor inconvenience.” If a product requires your hands to be in a danger zone to keep it running, they consider the product to have failed the “survive ownership” test even if the core function is strong.

They apply the same governance rule to ‘smart’ or guidance features: any prompts, voice, or automation are judged as ongoing cognitive load. Guidance earns praise only if it is meaningfully controllable (off/volume/timing/settings) and appropriately timed; if it becomes chatty or intrusive, they flag it as routine friction that will erode adherence over time.

In reviews, they act as peer-protectors who turn short trials into operational boundaries. They inventory what arrived, call out the exact trust-breaker (QC anomaly, proprietary single-point-of-failure, unsafe servicing mechanics, accidental-actuation risk, or a specific repeatable error mechanism), and then draw a crisp recommendation line: “great if you can avoid X / don’t buy if you need Y.” Their fairness rule is consistent: buyers should receive what’s implied, and continued use shouldn’t hinge on proprietary, fragile, hard-to-replace dependencies that can strand the product the moment one accessory is lost or damaged.
tribe_definition: A tribe of hands-on value beauty testers who try things hands-on before judging whether they work. They generally prioritize hands-on use, value for money, beauty and personal appearance.
population_definition: Health-conscious consumers who evaluate supplements, personal care, and wellness products.

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When evaluating a product’s core performance, they run it like a bounded experiment: they extract the promised behavior from the listing, compare it to a known reference, and state plainly when the output is benchmark-close. They then narrow in on the single repeatable mechanism that undermines trust (what it does and when it appears) rather than turning the whole product into a blanket “unreliable” verdict. Their review reads like a risk boundary: normal-case performance gets credit, but the recurring failure mode is named precisely so other buyers can predict whether they’ll trigger it.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Gap evidence shows they use benchmark-closeness to grant credibility while isolating one recurring error mechanism; predictions incorrectly escalated this into generalized unreliability or added framing not used to set the boundary (MEDIUM, multiple gap blocks).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When trying at-home beauty or personal-care tools, they mimic real use conditions and look for repeatable results, not one lucky session. They narrate technique, setup, and the small operational choices that change outcomes so other buyers can reproduce the same behavior. If success depends on hidden know-how, unusual workarounds, or babying the product, they count that as a usability tax the product imposed—not as user failure.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Gaps remain consistent with their repeatability standard and their habit of treating extra handling as product-imposed friction rather than a user mistake; this window also reinforces that they avoid speculative protocols not grounded in observed mechanisms (MEDIUM).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When judging value, they don’t stop at price-per-use; they price in whether the product can be kept alive with standard, replaceable parts. Even if everything else is excellent, they will downgrade value when a proprietary cable, tip, or accessory creates a single point of failure that can strand the product the moment it’s lost or damaged. In reviews they frame this as conditional approval—“nearly perfect if you never misplace X”—because the dependency, not performance, is what threatens longevity.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Gap blocks show proprietary dependency is treated as the primary drawback while the rest is praised; predictions padded reviews with additional performance/use-case/battery claims instead of keeping the single-point-of-failure norm central (HIGH).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When writing reviews, they aim to be fair but not artificially balanced: they state what worked, then draw a crisp recommendation boundary based on veto-level issues versus tolerable quirks. They foreground structural trust-breakers—QC anomalies, unsafe servicing requirements, ungovernable system behaviors, accidental-activation risk during maintenance, or a clear repeatable failure mechanism—rather than sprinkling in unrelated negatives to sound neutral. Praise is earned through consistent, controllable operation and low-friction ownership, not novelty or marketing claims.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Gap evidence shows they keep the review anchored on the true disqualifier (QC anomaly, unsafe servicing mechanics, proprietary dependency, intrusive guidance) and resist adding extra critique or alternate justifications that weren’t part of their decision rule (MEDIUM).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When assessing comfort and sensory experience, they tie it to adherence: does the sound, feel, or annoyance make the routine easier to repeat or make them avoid using it? They separate “noticeable” from “dealbreaking” by asking whether the sensation is governable (settings, timing, on/off) or whether it becomes unavoidable background friction. Sensory notes show up as operational constraints and controllability problems, not lifestyle storytelling.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: This window’s guidance-feature gaps reinforce that annoyance is judged as routine friction unless it can be governed; predictions omitted the governability axis and substituted other comfort/setup commentary (MEDIUM).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When a product fails or underperforms, they shift into troubleshooting mode and document what they changed, what improved, and what didn’t—but they avoid inventing causes they didn’t observe. They try to isolate the failure mechanism and will state it narrowly (“it does X sometimes even when nothing changed”) so readers can anticipate risk without being pushed into overgeneral conclusions. They are persuaded by explainable, repeatable causes and fixes, not generic reassurance or speculative narratives.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Gap blocks show predictions added speculative troubleshooting and extra framing, while the tribe’s norm is to keep claims limited to observed, repeatable mechanisms and avoid unfalsifiable explanations (MEDIUM).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When unboxing and setting up, they audit completeness and system integrity: what’s included, whether anything is abnormal, and whether the product can be used as implied without extra purchases. They treat abnormal components—especially parts that appear empty, unusable, or nonsensical—as a concrete QC breach that deserves explicit mention and a ‘where is QC?’ conclusion, not vague talk about packaging. Their reviews often include inventory-style specifics because they believe box contents are the first reliability signal and the first place hidden waste shows up.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Gap evidence repeatedly shows a specific anomalous/empty component is framed as the trust-breaker; predictions softened it into generic “loose pieces/packaging disorder” instead of the concrete QC signal and explicit accountability expectation (HIGH).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When evaluating modular or multi-part products, they treat first-use service steps (removal, swapping, cleaning) as a safety-and-survivability gate performed under real hand positions. If instructions effectively require touching an exposed sharp element, if the control layout invites accidental activation while hands are in the danger zone, or if a part visibly bends/deforms during a normal attempt, they call it a design failure and treat it as veto-level. They interpret immediate deformation during routine handling as proof the product won’t survive ownership, not as a one-off inconvenience.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Multiple gap blocks show predictions diluted explicit servicing mechanics (unsafe hand placement, accidental-activation layout critique, immediate deformation) into generic safety/fit annoyance; for this tribe those specifics are decisive gates (HIGH).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When a product includes guidance features (like voice prompts), they treat them as part of the workload of ownership, not a bonus. They evaluate whether guidance is optional and adjustable (off/volume/timing/settings), and they explicitly call out ‘too chatty’ guidance as routine cognitive load that will grind down adherence over time. If guidance can’t be governed, they treat it as an always-on friction point even when the core function is accurate.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Gap evidence shows the tribe explicitly evaluates chatty guidance as cognitive load and penalizes lack of control; predictions omitted this axis and replaced it with unrelated comfort/display/setup commentary (MEDIUM).

main.text: When they shop for at-home alternatives to professional services, they are chasing control: the ability to get consistent results on their schedule without depending on a technician. They feel satisfied when the product behaves predictably and the routine is repeatable without guesswork. The deeper reward is confidence—knowing their setup will work tomorrow the way it worked today.
main.rationalization: Gap evidence ties their strongest vetoes (unsafe servicing mechanics, accidental actuation risk, ungovernable guidance) to a loss-of-control threat more than to simple annoyance (MEDIUM).

main.text: When deciding whether something is ‘worth it,’ they are motivated to avoid purchases that collapse due to a single weak link—missing/abnormal components or proprietary accessories that are hard to replace. They experience these failures as preventable waste and a fairness violation, not normal tradeoffs, so they scrutinize dependency risk before they get excited about features. A product can be ‘nearly perfect’ in performance and still be judged risky if one replaceability bottleneck can strand it.
main.rationalization: Gap blocks repeatedly emphasize single-point-of-failure thinking (proprietary accessory risk; anomalous in-box components treated as QC breach), and predictions repeatedly tried to add other justifications instead of honoring this primary motivation (HIGH).

main.text: When they leave reviews, they are motivated by a peer-protection ethic: they want other buyers to avoid hidden gotchas and to understand real operating conditions. They believe specificity is the only honest way to warn people—naming the QC anomaly, the unsafe servicing step, the layout that enables accidental activation, or the mechanism behind a repeatable error. Their credibility comes from being concrete enough that another person can predict their own risk on day one and month two.
main.rationalization: Gaps show the tribe’s review purpose is actionable risk-forecasting (specific hazard/mechanism/QC anomaly), and generalized predictions failed that specificity standard (MEDIUM).

main.text: When a product claims to be easy or ‘smart,’ they are motivated to verify whether that ease is genuine or just shifted labor. They reward features that reduce cognitive load only when they’re optional and controllable, and they penalize ‘help’ that becomes noise, nags, or extra steps. Convenience, in their view, is not a feature claim—it’s a lived reduction in friction you can govern.
main.rationalization: Guidance-feature gaps reinforce their belief that convenience must be governable and friction-reducing in practice; predictions omitted the guidance-control axis (MEDIUM).

main.text: When they assess claims (performance, accuracy, longevity), they are motivated to test reality against mechanisms rather than vibes. They trust products more when the outcome is explainable and repeatable, and they will grant partial credit when results are benchmark-close while still flagging the one design behavior that creates systematic error. Random-feeling output triggers suspicion; explainable bias triggers targeted caution with clear boundaries.
main.rationalization: Gap blocks show they accepted mostly-close results while isolating a specific recurring error mechanism; predictions turned that into generalized unreliability or introduced extra framing not used by the reviewer (MEDIUM).

main.text: When comfort is part of the routine, they are motivated to avoid daily annoyances—sensations, sounds, or interactions that make them dread using the product. They will tolerate minor quirks if the product is controllable and reliable, but not if annoyance is unavoidable and compounding. Comfort is treated as an adherence factor, not a luxury detail.
main.rationalization: The gap emphasis on chatty, non-optional guidance as routine friction supports their comfort-as-adherence framing, and predictions’ omission of this axis highlights its motivational role (MEDIUM).

implicit_goals.text: When building their DIY routine, they aim to assemble a dependable system of products that can be set up quickly, used repeatedly, and maintained with minimal surprise costs. They plan for the month-two scenario: if a cable is lost or a part wears, can they replace it with a standard option and keep going? A ‘good buy’ is one that stays usable over time without scavenger-hunt dependencies.
implicit_goals.rationalization: This window’s proprietary-dependency gaps reinforce a forward-looking continuity goal beyond initial satisfaction (MEDIUM).

implicit_goals.text: When posting reviews, they aim to be the person who catches the hidden dealbreaker early—abnormal box contents, unsafe servicing instructions, control layouts that enable accidental activation during maintenance, or a specific failure mechanism the listing won’t mention. They want readers to know what to verify the moment the package arrives and what symptoms to watch for in use, because early detection prevents wasted time and unsafe scenarios. Their goal is not consensus; it’s preventing preventable bad purchases through actionable warnings and clear recommendation boundaries.
implicit_goals.rationalization: Gap blocks repeatedly emphasize early surfacing of specific QC anomalies and instruction/control-layout hazards, plus mechanism-level performance warnings; these are the points they want readers to act on (HIGH).

implicit_goals.text: When they try new tools or formulas, they aim to improve technique while staying safe and avoiding damage to themselves or the product. They want designs that forgive normal user learning curves and don’t require risky force, unsafe contact, or awkward maneuvers that place hands near hazards or trigger accidental actuation during servicing. Progress, for them, means more control and fewer workarounds over time—because anything that can’t be safely serviced won’t be kept in the routine.
implicit_goals.rationalization: This window strengthens that ‘safe learning’ includes real-hand-position serviceability, accidental activation risk, and immediate deformation during normal attempts—treated as design failures rather than user clumsiness (MEDIUM).

AG5A4BNLSYHH2IEFJD3UM3N2IPMA.product_description: Pinkiou Air Cushions BB Cream CC Cream Mushroomhead Foundation Moisturizing Concealer Hyaluronic Acid Molecule Deep Moisturizing Brightens the Complexion and Lasts for a Ｌong Ｔime（Ivory）
AG5A4BNLSYHH2IEFJD3UM3N2IPMA.review_text:
I love the idea of this concealer - the way it is dispensed and applied... and I like a lot of things about it. It's easy to apply, lightweight, and stays dewy looking so it reflects light. Medium coverage help reduce the appearance of dark circles under my eyes and uneven skin tone while still being able to see your skin beneath so it keeps you looking natural. I also like that it has little to no smell but what scent it does have is light and fresh.

However, the 'dewy' look I mentioned above is a bit on the shiny side for me, especially under the eyes - and the reason is because this product never seems to set. So unless you are building on top of it or using a setting powder or spray, you may want to find another product as it's not great on it's own.

Also, the dispenser worked EXCELLENT the first few uses but it QUICKLY goes from only needing a few light dabs of the sponge to really needing to work at getting any product out. Also, the applicator sponge has a mushroom shape to it and there is no way to easily get the product into the inner corner of my eye and I have to use a separate sponge or my finger to work the product into that area.

To summarize, I like how the product looks/covers on my skin, however I don't like that you seem to get so little of it, that it doesn't set well on it's own, and I wish the applicator was either tapered on one side a little or double ended with a smaller sponge on the other end of the wand.

Would I recommend it to my friends? Mayyybe but probably not.

AG5A4BNLSYHH2IEFJD3UM3N2IPMA.product_description: HAIRCUBE Natural Looking Short Blonde Wigs Pixie Cut Dark Root Ombre Blonde Wigs with Bangs Wigs for Women
AG5A4BNLSYHH2IEFJD3UM3N2IPMA.review_text:
This wig was just awful. I own a LOT of wigs and never has my twenty year old son busted out laughing when I came out in one. It's decent quality though, seems made well, but they style is just terrible and looked nothing like the pictures. it runs a bit small too so it just barely covers everything when positioned perfectly. But if it slips at ALL, it will show your hair around the edges. It doesn't look natural at all, despite being real hair... again, due to the fit. it looks like I'm wearing a hair hat. Sort of like when you KNOW a guy is wearing a toupee because it's just so obvious... this looks, again, like I am wearing a hat made out of hair. I don't know how else to describe it.
Also, to get the volume of the hair style, the scalp is a hot mess. it's teased to oblivion and feels very course and dry.

I played around with it for about a half hour trying to make this wig look okay, but to no avail. I give up. I'm sure that someone else may think this is a 5 star wig, everyone has different taste, but it's a hard pass for me.

AG5A4BNLSYHH2IEFJD3UM3N2IPMA.product_description: Magnetic eyelashes with eyeliner，Beevila False Eyelashes Upgraded 5D Magnetic Eyeliner and Eyelashes Kit, fake eyelashes 5 Pairs with Tweezers, Easy to Wear,No glue!
AG5A4BNLSYHH2IEFJD3UM3N2IPMA.review_text:
These are fairly natural looking lashes with a little length on them for 'oomph'. They made my eyes pop without any other makeup. These were a little more vavava voom than I was expecting based on the photos, but I still like them. I am a really natural girl so these are about as dramatic as I get. They don't brush my lid when I blink and are comfortable to wear all day. I really like them for special occasions!

The liner seems fresh. By that, I mean it goes on smoothly and isn't thick/dry or clumpy. I've had that happen a few times ordering lashes online.

AG5A4BNLSYHH2IEFJD3UM3N2IPMA.product_description: KOMOREBI 235PCS Temporary Tattoos 24 Sheets Body Stickers for Woman and Girls,Size Small Waterproof Fake Tattoos, Butterflies Style Body Art L5.9''xW4.1'' Tattoo for Party
AG5A4BNLSYHH2IEFJD3UM3N2IPMA.review_text:
[[VIDEOID:af53e1831a5573bd3fdb16f1eefe5d76]] These are incredibly cute and surprisingly realistic tattoos. I thought they would be kinda childish and look like a sticker because they are so bright on the white paper backing, but they aren't. They look much more natural when applied. There are a LOT (238) and my coworker and I had a blast looking through them and picking which ones to use first. LOL

They go on easily. No issues releasing from the backing. I've had it on for over a day now and it still looks perfect which is awesome, since it's on my wrist... I've washed and dried my hands at least a dozen times and even accidentally rubbed my loofah over it once this morning in the shower.

If you have used many temporary tattoos, so you that occassionally you will pick up some really cheap quality ones that are super shiny and/or stay ever so slightly tacky or something... because they get dirty on the outside edges over time. Not these. They are slightly 'not matte', but I wouldn't call them shiny. and the edges are almost invisible.

I would say that someone who didn't know you... like a grocery store cashier... wouldn't know this was fake.
I recommend these!

AG5A4BNLSYHH2IEFJD3UM3N2IPMA.product_description: Zeitun Natural Anti Cellulite Body Scrub - Organic Coffee Body Scrub Exfoliator With Robusta & Dead Sea Salt - Cinnamon, Ginger And Moisturizing Oils, 7 oz
AG5A4BNLSYHH2IEFJD3UM3N2IPMA.review_text:
First of all, this stuff smells amazing! like a fresh pot of coffee!

Second, however, it's not much more than coffee grounds... I could pretty much duplicate this scrub from stuff in my kitchen for a lot less money. It's coffee grounds, olive oil, salt and sugar, basically. There are a few other little active oils which I happen to also have around as I make my own soap, so the vitamin E oil, ect, is already in my cupboard as well.

The big question though... is it WORTH duplicating (or purchasing again)?
The answer for me is, unfortunately, no. It doesn't do much for my skin besides leave it feeling exfoliated, which any scrub can do. As other reviewers have said, the packaging is not shower friendly and it's a loose scrub. So I had to mix this with some coconut oil and clean out an old empty jar to store it in the shower. It's a lot of effort for a mediocre product.

It does what it says but there are better options out there.

AG5A4BNLSYHH2IEFJD3UM3N2IPMA.product_description: Hair Removal for Women & Men, Laser Hair Removal with FDA Cleared, IPL Hair Removal with 999,999 Flashes, Permanent Hair Removal Device for Face Whole Body at-Home
AG5A4BNLSYHH2IEFJD3UM3N2IPMA.review_text:
I’ve used several home laser hair removal devices since they became available to the public. compared to the other ones that I used before, this one is easy to use, compact, so I can even keep it in my desk at work, and seems to be as effective as my largest, most expensive name brand one that cost three times more.

Just be aware that it take multiple sessions to be effective as hair follicles alternate, some being dormant while others are active, so you think it's not working because hair keeps growing, but those were the follicles that were having a rest when you did the first session. also some stronger hairs will need a couple sessions, or stronger burst of light to die.

Point being, it could take up to a year to be 'hair free' but you should start noticing significantly LESS/thinner hair in the treated area within a few months of use after treating all follicles while active.

AG5A4BNLSYHH2IEFJD3UM3N2IPMA.product_description: We have found that there are always customer feedback that there is a problem with the ground wire and the ground wire is damaged. Here we want to emphasize that it is not that the grounding wire is damaged, but that the test method is wrong. Our grounding wire has a built-in 100kohm resistance, so the buzzer file test cannot be used, and the resistance value needs to be tested. If you need the grounding wire to be a pure conductor, we are sorry, please do not buy this product. All grounding wires of this product are equipped with 100k ohm safety resistance. We believe that safety resistors are necessary for safety. Conductivity Test Method: Step1, prepare grounding sheet, grounding cord, and multimeter (it is not included in this grounding sheet set). Step2, adjust the multimeter range to the ohm range, range is greater than 200 kiloohms (this step is very important, if the range selection is wrong, the multimeter reading will be 0). Step3, measure both ends of the grounding cord with a multimeter. If the resistance is 100 kiloohms, it means that the conductivity is normal. Step4, connect the grounding cord to the bed sheet, connect one end of the multimeter to the grounding cord plug, and the other end to any dark silver fiber of the grounding sheet. If the multimeter shows a valid reading, it indicates that the conductivity of the entire sheet is normal. Usage Method: When the grounding sheet is used, the black conductive material with buttons on the sheet shall be kept upward. The button end of the grounding cord is buckled on the button in the black area of the grounding sheet, and the other end is inserted into the grounding jack of the wall socket. Products Include: 1*grounding sheet 1*15 feet grounding cord 1*manual
AG5A4BNLSYHH2IEFJD3UM3N2IPMA.review_text:
I wish I had better things to say about this product. I've been looking at them for a while and I wanted it to work so badly as I have sleeping issues - and the science is sound.

The sheet is great quality, I will give it that. If any WERE going to work for me, I don't see why it wouldn't be this one. I don't think another brand would work any better.

I usually wake up about three times a night for seemingly no reason at all. Sleep studies haven't even been able to pin it down... which is why I've resorted to trying anything new that claims to help sleep, but last night I must have woken up five or six times. Way more than usual! I'm NOT saying I woke up more because of this sheet (that's pretty normal)... but I AM saying it didn't help me sleep BETTER. So I'm disappointed. But that doesn't mean it wont work for someone else.

I will continue to use it as perhaps it works over time and I will come back and update if my sleep suddenly changes for the better in the near future. If I haven't updated, it hasn't helped.

AE3QBGRRHKT3GFDPRXFEN7JICEZQ.product_description: MAYJAM 12PCS Gel Nail Polish Set - Nude Blue Green Glitter Red Colors Collection with Base Top Coat - 8ML Gel Polish Kit Manicure DIY Home Salon
AE3QBGRRHKT3GFDPRXFEN7JICEZQ.review_text: Comes with base coat and glossy/matte top coats as well as the colors. The colors are really nice and go on smoothly.

AE3QBGRRHKT3GFDPRXFEN7JICEZQ.product_description: Gelike Reflective Glitter Gel Nail Polish - Gorgeous Gold Colors Soak Off Disco Diamond Nail Art Polish Sparkly Shiny Manicure Varnish, UV Led Lamp Required, 0.34 Fl.Oz
AE3QBGRRHKT3GFDPRXFEN7JICEZQ.review_text: The gold sparkle in this is beautiful! And it's a fairly dense glitter so you only need 2 coats if you didn't feel like doing a third. I don't think a third is necessary to get the most out of this polish.

AE3QBGRRHKT3GFDPRXFEN7JICEZQ.product_description: Purple Shampoo and Conditioner Set - Sulfate Free Salon Grade (2 x 16.9 fl oz) - Hydrating Toner - Shimmer Correction for Platinum Blonde, Silver, Light, and Grey Hair - New Formula
AE3QBGRRHKT3GFDPRXFEN7JICEZQ.review_text: I really wanted to like this set. My initial thoughts on it while applying it in the shower was "no" because it provided absolutely no moisturizing qualities to my hair. The conditioner was more like a shampoo and the shampoo was horribly drying! I ended up having to use a seperate extra moisturizing conditioner after I rinsed this out. AE3QBGRRHKT3GFDPRXFEN7JICEZQ.product_description: ROSEGIN 23 Pcs Gel Nail Polish Set with Glossy and Matte Top and Base Coat Soak Off Gel Polish Colors Pink Red Green Neon Long Lasting Nail Gel Polish
AE3QBGRRHKT3GFDPRXFEN7JICEZQ.review_text: This set is packaged really nicely and includes 20 polishes plus a  base coat and both glossy and matte top coats. The bottles of color are small, super small, only 5ml! And most of the glitters need 3 coats at a minimum so you won't get much use out of those unless you only use them as accent nails. The creams are nice and opaque though, this was a one coater in the pic. I did like that there was a white crelly even though after 3 coats it still wasn't opaque. Ultimately this is an average set. The small size of the bottles and the sheerness of the glitters makes it a 3 star product. There are too many other sets out there that are better to put this one at the top of the list but because of the number of polishes that also includes base/top coats it's still better than others.

AE3QBGRRHKT3GFDPRXFEN7JICEZQ.product_description: UV LED Nail Lamp – 128W Rapid-Curing Gel Nails Dryer for Manicures and Pedicures – Dual-Voltage with Extra-Long Cable, Multi-Language Manual – Professional Gel Lamp for Homes or Salons by OVLUX, Gold
AE3QBGRRHKT3GFDPRXFEN7JICEZQ.review_text: I previously purchased a higher watt lamp with the hopes that it would cut down my curing time for doing gels at home. Unfortunately it did not and it also made my nail beds burn so that lamp went in the trash! This lamp doesn't have quite as high of wattage as that other one but is higher than most standard ones. So far it seems to do the trick for me. Cuts down on the time with no burn! Yay! It has a motion activated sensor so it will turn on to the last setting you used when you put your hand (or foot) in, there are several timed settings that countdown (10,30,60 & 99 low heat) or it will count up without selecting one of those to 120 seconds, and the bottom detaches to do pedicures. Very nice light at a great value!

AE3QBGRRHKT3GFDPRXFEN7JICEZQ.product_description: 3 Barrel Curling Iron, Milantia 3/4 Inch Mini Travel Curling Wand Hair for Small Curly, Dual Voltage Ceramic Tourmaline 19mm Crimper Hair Iron for Women - Fast Heating, Portable
AE3QBGRRHKT3GFDPRXFEN7JICEZQ.review_text:
Ok, I know the photos of the product show the box that says "mini-curler" but nothing in the description indicates how MINI it truly is! I've never owned a 3 barrel iron before so I watched a few videos online while I was waiting for this to arrive. It looked easy enough, though I was questioning the size of the ones they used versus the what I ordered. The barrel is 3/4" so I knew that would make for a tighter curl regardless and I was ok with that. What I didn't think about was the overall size of the whole thing. It's tiny, like really, really small lol I attached a pic of me holding it, it's like a play curling iron for a child lol BUT it does work! I was able to curl through all of my hair in no time at all and it left me feeling like I got a perm in 10 mins (see pic of my hair straight vs curled)! Not something I'm going to want to do on a regular basis. I think I want more of a relaxed wave for that which means a much larger barrel size, but for special occasions when I do want my hair curly this will do the trick nicely.
A separate, tiny complaint is the inability to adjust the heat setting. I have very thin hair and I generally don't use very high heat settings on my other curlers/straighteners but this one was either on or off, no adjustment for heat so I had to make sure to not hold my hair in for too long so I wouldn't risk breaking it off. It's not the most ideal situation but it is a fairly easy fix to just err on the side of not long enough rather than too long.

AE3QBGRRHKT3GFDPRXFEN7JICEZQ.product_description: Color Changing Gel Nail Polish Set Spring Summer Mood Nail Polish for Starter and Professional 6 Colors Pink Red Blue Yellow Purple Brown Manicure Kit for Valentine’s Day Girlfriend Gift
AE3QBGRRHKT3GFDPRXFEN7JICEZQ.review_text:
I have quite a few regular nail polishes that are thermal and I love the magic of the changing colors. I really enjoy showing people how cool it looks for the polish to change color right before their eyes! Now having the option to do this with long lasting gel polish is super exciting! I swatched these colors and was able to immediately see the color difference after being under the warm lights of the led lamp so the changing is very sensitive, which is really what you want in a thermal polish. The stickers on the tops of the bottles aren't all that color accurate BUT they do give a general idea of what the colors are so you can have an idea of what you have. I did 2 coats for each color and it's a little hard to tell but some were great with 2 coats and others really could have benefited from a third. The glitter polish is really not a pretty color at all, I kind of wish it was either just a different thermal all together or they had chose different colors for it. The blue and reddish colors were the best formulas, seeming more like regular nail polish (not as thick and much smoother application).
The set is packaged great for gift giving. If you know anyone who really likes polish this would be great for them, keeping in mind if they don't already work with gel polishes they will need not only some type of lamp but also a base and top coat since this set does not include those.

AGYRMITUSD6IEQMJDPHYMA7CJI2Q.product_description: Detangling Brush for Curly Hair,Natural Hair Brush for Hair Textured 3A to 4C Kinky Wavy/Curly/Coily/Wet/Dry/Oil/Thick/Long Hair, Exfoliating for Beautiful and Shiny Curls
AGYRMITUSD6IEQMJDPHYMA7CJI2Q.review_text:

I wish I had discovered this brush months ago and I would give them 10 stars if I could!.

This brushwork all hair types and I highly recommend them

AGYRMITUSD6IEQMJDPHYMA7CJI2Q.product_description: Hyaluronic Acid Serum for face - 11% Low molecules Anti-aging Hydrating Booster Serum 100% Pure Hyaluronic Acid
AGYRMITUSD6IEQMJDPHYMA7CJI2Q.review_text:

Too many beauty serums tend to over promise, and under deliver in addition to being way overpriced., so I am delighted to find a reasonably priced product that exceeded my expectations. I highly recommend this one!

AGYRMITUSD6IEQMJDPHYMA7CJI2Q.product_description: Sam&Helen Magnetic Eyelashes With Eyeliner Kit, 5Pairs Magnetic Eyelashes And 2 Tubes Magnetic Eyeliners With Eyelash Applicator-No Glue Needed

AGYRMITUSD6IEQMJDPHYMA7CJI2Q.product_description: Natural Waterproof Lash Mascara Black, 4D Silk Fiber Eyelash Mascara Makeup, Lengthening and Thick, No Clumping, Smudge-proof, Long-Lasting Voluminous Eyelashes Dramatic Extension Makeup Kit Eye Lash

AGYRMITUSD6IEQMJDPHYMA7CJI2Q.review_text: Out of all the 4D Silk Mascaraas I've tried recently the CPCP Elegant Princess Long Fiber Eyelash Mascara is one of my favorites. The packaging is gorgeous and the brush is a thicker comb-like bristle, which is great for volume and definition. AHSV4TYSAX52BIHH7PLZRD44KZHA.product_description: Scrunchie Holder Stands with 8 Pack Large Size Scrunchies - Acrylic Hair Ties Organizer for Teenage Girls and VSCO Girls Gift Stuff
AHSV4TYSAX52BIHH7PLZRD44KZHA.review_text:
This is definitely one of those products that I absolutely don’t need and didn’t know it existed, but now that I have one and know it exists, I love it and don’t want to let it go.
Honestly, this product is incredibly simple - it’s just a tube with a base, and even the base probably isn’t completely necessary.This particular holder comes with the tube and base connected and the open end of the tube facing down, so you’re unable to store anything inside of it unless you use it upside down, but then you couldn’t grab scrunchies off of it as easily. The strange thing about it is that the bottom of the base has some kind of brown paper on it - it looks like it should be removable, but it’s not. Honestly, since I’ll be keeping scrunchies on this pretty much all the time this will likely remain covered, but I still don’t like it. I would also like it better if the diameter of the tube was slightly smaller so some of my ties that are slightly smaller don’t get stretched out, but I can work with this. I’m very happy it fits perfectly on my bookcase where I wanted it to go, and I also really love that even though it’s only $10, it comes with eight scrunchies to get you started. I’ve been using one of these scrunchies all week and so far it’s holding up well - while I thought I wouldn’t like the material, it actually feels way nicer than it looks. I’m very happy with this product and am considering getting more as gifts for others later this year, if it holds up. I did get mine to use for scrunchies as the listing suggests, but you could also definitely use it for other things such as bracelets - it’s quite simple, but convenient.

AHSV4TYSAX52BIHH7PLZRD44KZHA.product_description: Plant Therapy Natural Acetone Free Nail Polish Remover 6 fl oz One Touch Dispensing Bottle with Flip Top Cap Tropical Flower Scent
AHSV4TYSAX52BIHH7PLZRD44KZHA.review_text:
Bottom line - this nail polish does what it’s supposed to do, I just don’t love it as much as I was hoping I would.
The first reason for this is that it’s oily - it leaked during shipping, so about a quarter of the shipping box was soaked in oil. Of course, since it leaked it’s all over the bottle, and since it’s oil, it’s not terribly fun to clean up. Even if it didn’t leak, I don’t love the oiliness. It definitely sticks around on your hands when you use it.
The second reason is the smell - as soon as I opened the shipping box, I could smell it and at first I thought it smelled wonderful, like a rainbow cherry flavored candy cane, although the smell was incredibly strong. Riding in my car with it for a few minutes, my husband and I both could smell it for the rest of the day, and leaving it in the car while we shopped for maybe an hour, the smell was overpowering when we came back out to the car. So, I let it sit in the box for a few days hoping the smell would eventually die down; it did, but when actually using the polish, it doesn’t have this same nice smell. It smells a bit like vinegar, or something similar - definitely not like acetone, and not like flowers which is like I was worried about, but still not great. Personally, I’d prefer the smell of acetone.
Finally, the bottle - it has a convenient flip cap and a pump you press down to dispense it which is supposed to be convenient, but in reality, it makes a mess. I think this is possibly because you have to push fairly hard on it to get any out. But, as I said, this nail polish remover does work pretty well. I used it on a polish with tiny holo glitter in it, and had no problems, and my husband had no problems getting it to remove foil or plain creme polish. Essentially, the thing both of us really don’t like about it is the oiliness. The other things we could deal with, but because of the oiliness we won’t be buying this product again after this bottle. However, if that wouldn’t bother you, we think this is a great option if you’re looking for an alternative to acetone.
I have provided a picture of my bottle - you can see the oiliness around the edges of the label, and you can somewhat see the oil still all over the bottle. Note that I did clean the bottle off before I used it, and have kept it upright and in a plastic bag since then - it’s just a messy product.

AGWXHH2DQWVMVZA3GHAFJQ7ROGQA.review_text: These headbands are cute. I love the colors. The red one was missing a row of rhinestones. The headband was a little bit smaller than normal.  It is still cute and looks great on my head. Make sure to check for frills.

AGWXHH2DQWVMVZA3GHAFJQ7ROGQA.product_description: Hetianmei® Pink Rhinestone Headbands for Women，Jewel Headband，Bling Diamond Headbands Crystal Fashion Sparkly Jeweled Thick Headbands for Woman
AGWXHH2DQWVMVZA3GHAFJQ7ROGQA.review_text: This headband is super cute. The color is gorgeous. It was made really well. I did not find any flaws. It fit my head comfortably. It doesn't feel too tight. It's a cute Christmas gift.

AGWXHH2DQWVMVZA3GHAFJQ7ROGQA.product_description: FASHION IDOL 5 Packs Long Faux Locs Crochet Hair 26 Inch Dreadlocks Crochet Hair Extensions Natural Black Straight Synthetic Crochet Locs
AGWXHH2DQWVMVZA3GHAFJQ7ROGQA.review_text: These faux locs are really cute and look even better after you install them. out the package, they look really uniformed. However, once you install them they look different and more realistic. They were well packaged. None of them had any flaws. 5 packs is more than enough to complete a full install.

AGWXHH2DQWVMVZA3GHAFJQ7ROGQA.product_description: Eyenjoy Poly Gel Nail Kit,Nail Builder Gel Extension Nail Gel Kit,6 Regular Color Nail Extension Slip Solution Professional Kit for DIY Mother Girl Gift
AGWXHH2DQWVMVZA3GHAFJQ7ROGQA.review_text: [[VIDEOID:fe99502a71118beecb7634412a69b1aa]] This jet is cute. It comes with everything for you to do your own nails. The polygel tubes are pretty small. However, a little bit goes a long way if you’re just doing an overlay. If you’re doing a fullset, they are not going to last long . It was packaged really well. This is definitely something you would gift to someone.

AGWXHH2DQWVMVZA3GHAFJQ7ROGQA.product_description: UV LED Nail Lamp – 128W Rapid-Curing Gel Nails Dryer for Manicures and Pedicures – Dual-Voltage with Extra-Long Cable, Multi-Language Manual – Professional Gel Lamp for Homes or Salons by OVLUX, Gold
AGWXHH2DQWVMVZA3GHAFJQ7ROGQA.review_text: This little lamp works really well when I say it works it really works. It dries my nails so quickly like it doesn’t need to even take the whole 30 seconds. This is really worth the cost. This is great for personal use or salon use. You can even remove the bottom part of the lamp in order to do is dry someone’s feet or a dry your hands if it’s being difficult. It was packaged really well. It didn’t take so long to dry the polygel also. This is a great gift to a nail tech.

AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.product_description: NIRA Skincare Laser & Serum Bundle - Includes Anti-Aging Laser & Hyaluronic Acid Serum - Reduces Appearance of Fine Lines & Wrinkles - FDA Cleared
AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.review_text: This is perfect for my between salon visits. I have been using this now twice a week for over a month and I absolutely love it! My skin looks amazing and feels super smooth and silky. This is also super easy to use (just follow instructions). I can see already that I will begin expanding the time between visits which will definitely help me save money in the long run. Highly recommend!

AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.product_description: Caroline Keller Keratin Shampoo for dry and damaged hair and scalp. With Argan oil, Avocado oil Keratin and Vitamins. Specially formulated for Post Keratin Treatments. Salt Free. 16.9 fl.Oz
AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.review_text: I get Keratin treatments at the salon at least 3-4 times a year (would do it more often if I could afford it). I am always in the market to use products that can help extend my salon visits. This Keratin shampoo is really nice. It is sulfate free (which is the first thing I look for ) and makes my hair feel silky smooth and soft. I highly recommend for anyone who wants to improve the texture and appearance of your hair. I really like the fragrance, too.

AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.product_description: Orange Peel Nature's Cleanse Facial Scrub - by Visage Pure - USDA Organic - Physician Formulated - Research Supported - Natural Exfoliating, Refreshing, Brightening, Skin Tightening Vitamin C Scrub. Cleans the Pores Deeply and Refreshes the Skin Bringing Back Its Glow
AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.review_text: I was very disappointed when I got this facial scrub. I had assumed it was like other scrubs I use but it wasn't. This is a powder which you need to mix with water to make a paste before you put it on your face. I have a tendency to like to use scrubs in the shower with me, so this extra step doesn't really work for me. As far as the scrubbing factor goes, it's ok. I didn't feel a real smoothing or softening of my skin after use the way I have with others. The biggest plus is the fragrance (i love the smell of oranges). I won't be repurchasing.

AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.product_description: OGANA CELL Peptide Concentrating Amazing Lotion 2.03 fl.oz. (60ml) - 650ppm Peptide Contained Mild Moisturizing Facial Lotion, Hypoallergenic Natural Ingredients for Sensitive Skin
AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.review_text: This is a really nice moisturizing lotion. It goes on lightly and is readily absorbed into my skin. My skin feels amazingly softer and smoother and allows for a nice base for my makeup to be applied over. You only need a small pea sized amount to cover your entire face and neck. Highly recommend for all skin types, ages and for women as well as men.

AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.product_description: Keratin Secrets Do It Yourself Home Keratin System
AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.review_text: I try to get Keratin treatments every 3 months, but honestly it has been getting costly. So, when I saw this I was excited to try it. I found it difficult to use and almost impossible to get to saturate the back of my hair and straight iron it the way they do in the salon. Front and sides were ok, but I couldn't maneuver the back to get it straight. Then I saw the ingredients after the first time and saw it contained formaldehyde and that was the last time I used the actual treatment. I did, however, use the shampoo and conditioner (and I still am). I wish they sold the S&C separate because I really did like it and I am always in the market for a good hair wash which won't strip my hair between treatments. I will resume my regular treatments at my salon.

Really nice small brush. Made well, nice wood made with boar bristle, my son absolutely loves this. It brushes his hair well and keeps him looking his best. This compact size makes it nice to keep in the center console of his car or to take on vacation with him. Highly recommend!

AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.product_description: Hanhoo Red pomegranate 6pcs Skin Care Set (6pcs/set)
AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.review_text: I had never tried anything for my skin consisting of pomegranate, so I was anxious to try this. It actually is an entire skin care regimine containing a cleanser, a toner, a facial cream, an eye cream and overall moisurizers. I actually was quite surprised how well this worked from start to finish. It was nice having an entire skin care routine in one package (instead of me working with various separate products. Fragrance is light and smells almost apple-like (but very light). I particularly like the cleanser and the toner. It also comes in a beautiful gift box so this would make a wonderful gift for someone. I bought another for my mother-in-law and plan to give it to her when we visit next month. Highly recommend!

AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.product_description: 24K Gold Under Eye Mask– 20 Pairs- Under Eye Patches with Face Massager Roller, Anti-Aging Hyaluronic Acid Collagen Eye Masks for Dark Circles and Puffiness Dark Under Eyes Treatment
AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.review_text: When I saw this, I was thrilled to be able to try it. I have suffered from bags and dark circles under my eyes for years now. I have been 'using' this for almost three weeks and I am not happy with it. First, it's almost impossible for me to keep it in place under my eyes. They come wet out of the packet and I was unsure what side was supposed to be placed on my skin. They do not stay in place and I found them falling off easily. Of course, maybe it was me or my skin, so please don't just rely on my review (read others). I will not be reordering.

AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.product_description: Bellezza Versa Styler 1 Inch Titanium Plates Flat Iron Twisted Hair Straighteners (Blush Pink)
AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.review_text: This is a great hair straightener. Heats up quickly and evenly, makes it easy to take the curl out of my naturally wavy hair. It fits easily in my hand and maneuvers around the front and back of my head easily. Does not heat up my countertop (keeps the heat on the iron). I love this pink, too, it matches my decor perfectly. I highly recommend this Bellezza styler.

AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.product_description: Organic Bamboo Cotton Ear Swabs by Bali Boo - 200 - Natural Wooden Qtips Cotton Swabs for Cleaning Ears, Baby or Makeup and Nails - Sustainable & Vegan Buds Sticks - Eco Friendly & Biodegradable
AFSKPY37N3C43SOI5IEXEK5JSIYA.review_text: I really like these ear swabs. First they come in a large, handy box and are easy to store (will last a long time). Second, they are all organic and good for the environment. Third, they are strong and don't fall apart very easily. I highly recommend these over Q-Tips (which I have used for years).

AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.product_description: ITFER Hydro Intensive Moisturizing Emulsion 3.3 fl oz, 5-Layer Hyaluronic Acid and Edelweiss and Hibiscus Provide Powerful Antioxidant Effect to Skin, Skin Irritation Test Completed
AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.review_text:
I use this right before bedtime after I have showered and washed up. I do about 2 pumps to cover my face and neck.

It has a decent scent, might not be for everyone though. It feels very lightweight on the skin. It starts off with a slightly sticky feel, but quickly goes away once absorbed.

Still too soon to see how this helps my skin. But so far, I am liking this! No reactions at all, from a person with sensitive skin.

AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.product_description: Hynt Beauty Perfetto Pressed Eye Shadow Singles (Khaki Star)
AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.review_text:
Very nice formula. Easy to apply and blend. Not much for fall out either which I really appreciate. Very slight shimmer / sheen. Not glittery, but enough to catch the light.

The color I got is Khaki Star. I can best describe it as a dark olive green color, mixed with a cool brown shade. For me its a great color to use to darken up a eye look, and add dimension. For me it would be a bit dark for all over color, especially where I have dark brown eyes. Blue or green eyes might be able to better pull that off.

AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.product_description: Tattoo Lipstick Cotton Swab Lip Tint Kit,Lip Gloss Stain Permanent Lip Color Makeup,Long Lasting Waterproof Disposable Portable Lipstick,Matte Nude Red Pink & Rose Red Liquid Lipstick,20 Pcs/4 Colors
AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.review_text:
These are a disaster. I have used similar items in the past, and really thought these colors would be beautiful. First mishap happened while trying to snap the tip on these. It just wouldn't happen. I had to get scissors to cut them. So for on the go use, it was a fail.

Next, the colors. Terrible. I tried the nude shade.... It looked like I had orange food coloring all over my lips. Bright orange at that. No where even near being "nude".

The color was very patchy, and just didn't apply well at all. Once on, it only stayed onto any dry patches that my lips might have had. Other than that, it disappeared after a hour.

AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.product_description: Daletu Nail Clips, 10PCS Clear Nail Clips Finger Extension Fixed Clip, Quick Building Finger Builder Nail Clamps, Nails Art DIY Manicure Tool
AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.review_text:
I am a beginner with poly gel nails, so I thought it would be best if I got these and used them. And let me tell you I am glad that I did. Some of the poly gels that I have used can move around, and these clips just add a bit of security and ensuring that your nails don't move around while curing.

These work just as claimed, and I use them now every time that I do poly gel nails at home.

AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.product_description: 6pcs Bridal Pearl Headband for Women Wedding Hair Accessories,White Faux Pearl Hairbands Bridal Bridesmaid Bridal Hair Hoop | Bridesmaid Proposal Gifts (Different Pearl-6pack)
AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.review_text:
I have fine thin hair, so headbands often don't work well with my hair type. I have been wearing these for a few weeks now, and I'm fairly impressed.

These stay in my hair better than I thought they would. I still secure them with bobby pins since there isn't much for them to grip onto with my hair. They need minimal adjusting. They are a lot more comfortable to wear than what I was expecting as well.

They are pretty, and are a great way to add a sophisticated look to any hair style. I love the different sizes of pearls, and different designs on each headband.

AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.product_description: Nail Polish Gel Remover Tools Kit for Women with Nail Clip Caps, Nail File, Nail Remover Cotton Pads,Brush, 2-in-1 Cuticle Scraper and Pusher, Nail Separator
AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.review_text:
My review for these is going to be pretty basic. This kit does exactly as it claims. It comes with some very helpful tools that are great to have when you are doing your nails or removing polish. The actual clip caps work very easily, and stay on quite well. I could still somewhat function while my nails were being de-polished.

No issues at all with this kit, and highly recommend. I used these to help take off my gel nail polish, and they were definitely a asset to have. Made that process a lot easier and mess free.

AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.product_description: Segems Organic Handmade Whipped Body Butter with Cocoa Butter
AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.review_text:
Let me start off with first impressions. My container arrived looking ragged. The label looked like it had been halfway peeled off, then put back down. I opened the container, and inside there was another lid with a spatula spoon to use with the cream. Mine was put on backwards, and the spoon was down into the cream. Normally this would be a issue, but this "whipped" body butter is hard as a rock. Mind you, I got this on a 70 degree day, and used it on this same day. I had to use the spatula to try and scrape the product onto my hand.

I tried this out in multiple places that are dry on my body.... what a disaster. It took a few minutes for me to warm up the product between my fingers and truly get it to be like a body butter. Even after this, the body butter had a slight gritty texture to it. It went onto my skin alright. Thin layer is all you need. It took a while to sink into my skin, and once it did it left a very greasy, oily feeling on my skin. I had to blot with a paper towel where I had applied it because it was so oily.

Unfortunately I am not a fan of this. I have used raw shea butter in the past, and I had better results using that than this. Wanted to love it, but it just was a fail for me.

I have been using sponges like these for years to apply my foundation. These work wonderfully and work just as well as the expensive sponges on the market.

I like that with these, I can dampen them to help sheer out my foundation when I just need a light coverage. They make my makeup application look flawless.

I replace mine every month to keep sanitary. I highly recommend doing the same! You can wash these, but even then I toss mine and replace them monthly.

AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.product_description: 24 Inches Synthetic Long Curly Blonde Wig Natural Wavy Hair NONE Lace Heat Resistant Wigs for Women Cosplay Costume
AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.review_text:
The wig itself is pretty, and is something I'd wear for cosplay or costume. I don't think it is something I could pull off for everyday wear.

What I really don't like about this wig, is that on the top of the wig, right on the part, there is about 2 inches of hair that is cut super short. I included photos to show what I mean. When I put the wig on, these hairs don't wanna stay down. They stick out to the side, or up in the air. I really don't understand why it was cut that way. If they are trying to do baby hairs, they definitely did it wrong. The only hair that is cut is the darker brown part, which really makes it stand out against the blonde. I don't know what they were trying to do, but it doesn't look good.

I will probably end up cutting those pieces off and hopefully it will look ok with them gone. Having a cowlick on the top of my head just isn't the look I am going for.

The wig itself is on par with the price. It did shed on me a bit. I'm hoping that with some customizing I can turn this wig into a nice costume piece. It fits snug on my head which I like.

AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.product_description: ❤-Outfits Set Include: 1 pack of 5 3D mask bracket (not including mask or cloth, etc.). ❤-Size: about 10*9*4.2cm / 3.9*3.51*1.64 inches, enough space for various masks. ❤-Unique design: designed to fit the face of the nose bridge, breathing more smoothly, breathable and not stuffy. ❤-Ideal Saver for Makeup - It makes the mask not to stick lipstick, protecting your perfect makeup from being messed up.If you wear glasses, 3D Inner Bracket can also prevent the lens from fogging because of more breathing space. ❤ 3D Inner Bracket also suitable for various ma-sks.Using double sided tape or thread to fasten the silicone frame onto the mask can make it work better.
AGZKLDUDYELPMHACIWTGAYSQHSSA.review_text:
I work outside, and I am required to wear a mask. They are super hot to wear, especially out in the 80-90 degree weather. I found these, and thought I'd give them a try!

These have helped me by giving me space to be able to talk fairly normally, as well as space to breathe without issue. The fit on these could be improved, but I don't experience any real discomfort when wearing for long periods of time. I like having the mask up and away from my face. Feels better!

Overall I like these, and I do use them daily at work. So they get a recommendation from me!

AFIJLAW3HIOMRUFSWNH54IJ3XQAA.product_description: Vegan Mia - USDA Organic Radiance Superfruit Cleansing Oil and Make-up Remover, Oil Cleanser and Makeup Remover Oil for Dry Skin and Other Skin Types, Loaded with Moisturizer Essential Fatty Acids, Rich in Antioxidants, Truly Natural Skincare, (With No Added Fragrance) 3.4 fl oz
AFIJLAW3HIOMRUFSWNH54IJ3XQAA.review_text:
This product comes in a glass bottle with a pump dispenser. The dispenser has a very small spout, making it difficult to dispense the product without having it run down the side of the bottle. Note that there is oil in the name - it feels like an oil and goes on like an oil, with no foaming or cleansing at all. It also has a strong scent of lavender (which I like, but others may not).

This product works well as a remover for eye makeup. However, I don't feel that it does a good job of cleansing my face overall. Although the product rinses clean and leaves my face feeling soft, my face doesn't feel clean, and I feel the need to use an actual cleanser after. I would recommend this product as a eye makeup remover only and would suggest that "cleanser" be removed from the name.

AFIJLAW3HIOMRUFSWNH54IJ3XQAA.product_description: Besame Cosmetics | Forever Red Lipstick - 1925 | Classic Color Lipstick | Vintage Makeup | Long Lasting Lipstick | Semi Matte Lipstick for Women | Moisturizing Lipstick for Sensitive Skin
AFIJLAW3HIOMRUFSWNH54IJ3XQAA.review_text: This is a red lipstick in an attractive case. I don't wear a lot of red, as so many of the red lipsticks turn orange-y on me, but this one appeared more blue-based, so I decided to try it. It goes on smoothly and has decent staying power. It does seem to have more blue undertones than some I've tried. However, based on the picture of 3 stacked lips that appears in the item description, I was looking for a result similar to the center one (or top one if you are looking at the lower photo that appears above the reviews), especially given that my skin color is close to the skin of that model, but on me, the color looks more like it does in the bottom photo, with a slightly more orange-y hue. This is not bad if that's what you want; just be aware that your personal result might vary from what is pictured.

AFIJLAW3HIOMRUFSWNH54IJ3XQAA.product_description: Gold Collagen Under Eye Patches Mask for dark circles and puffiness by Levitural - Golden Eye Bags Treatment - Mother's Day Gift for Women
AFIJLAW3HIOMRUFSWNH54IJ3XQAA.review_text: I was looking for something to help with my dark undereye patches and to generally revive my eyes. I have used these twice now around the holidays when I've been worn out. These comma-shaped masks are easy enough to apply - there is a little spatula thing to help lift them out in order to be sanitary. They have a wet, silicone-like feel that is very similar to the feel of a contact lens, only thicker. I found that they stuck to my skin fairly well, even when I was moving around. The mask felt nice on and was a bit cooling after awhile. The area under my eyes felt refreshed after using these, although I didn't actually notice anything visibly different. These might be worth it if you are simply looking to make your eye area feel better.

I recently started using this product in the shower.  It has a nice gel-like consistency and lathers easily.  The fragrance is a strong cucumber scent, which I didn't like, but luckily it faded quickly.  Overall, this performs well for cleaning the face and leaving it feeling fresh, but it is not a particularly remarkable or different product.

I love trying different lotions, particularly those that have nice fragrance, but when I received this set, I almost threw it away! I the bottle, the smell of the lotion is horrible - I found it to have a strong, artificial scent similar to alcoholic spirits. I decided to give it a try so that I could write an accurate review. The "lotion" is quite thin, much more watery than any other moisturizer I have used. Just to spread on my elbows requires at least 10 pumps from the tiny bottle. The good news is that once on the skin, the distasteful fragrance does not last; I didn't really detect much scent at all after that, but there may have been a faint hint of rose in the dry-down. The moisturization was adequate, nothing more.

I do like the Nail & Cuticle Oil, which comes in a little roller bottle and actually DOES have a rose scent. But this set is absolutely NOT worth the cost, especially given that the lotion is likely to be completely gone after just a few weeks of daily use. Not recommended.

NOTE: At least one other reviewer ("Jam Blaster") mentioned the same issue with the lotion smelling bad and gave this product just 1-star as a result.

UPDATE, 2/1/21:
Since I don't like the scent of this product, I decided to try it on my feet. Despite the lotion being very thin, I actually found it to work quite well on my feet! I put it on in the a.m., then put on socks; by the end of the day, my feet definitely felt soften and smoother. I think the product is too expensive to purchase for this reason alone, but it does work, and so I increased my rating to 3-star.

AFIJLAW3HIOMRUFSWNH54IJ3XQAA.product_description: INIKA Organic Deep Plum Lipstick Crayon, 0.11 OZ
AFIJLAW3HIOMRUFSWNH54IJ3XQAA.review_text: This matte lipcolor pencil goes on nice and smooth.  It doesn't dry my lips like some other products.  The color is a deep plum, although very natural rather than intense.  I would recommend this.

AFIJLAW3HIOMRUFSWNH54IJ3XQAA.product_description: BEPHOLAN Natural Eyelash Growth Serum and Brow Enhancer to Grow Thicker, Longer Lashes for Long, Luscious Lashes and Eyebrows|15ML
AFIJLAW3HIOMRUFSWNH54IJ3XQAA.review_text:
I have been using this product for several weeks now. I choose the option for the "mascara brush" style, as I thought this might be easier to use than the thin brush styles I've tried in the past. My results with this were mixed. First, the product is barely discernible on the brush! It seems only completely dry; more product gets on the wand part than on the brush end. Second, the brush is plastic and feels VERY harsh; a brush with soft bristles might have been better.

That being said, this product has seemed to help my lashes somewhat. The effect isn't very noticeable with bare lashes, but when I use mascara, my lashes do look thicker and longer than they would normally. I have used this product on my eyebrows too and have seen some improvement there as well. I wish this was a little easier to use; I would rate it about three and a half stars.

AE5GH4VM5Q5HNUL4EOAYRLNB7RVA.product_description: Admutty Pre Stretched Braiding Hair 28inch 8 Packs Synthetic Crochet Braids,Natural Braid Crochet Hair,Professional Soft Yaki Straight Texture(1B/30)
AE5GH4VM5Q5HNUL4EOAYRLNB7RVA.review_text: The color is pretty and the hair is soft but it got a bit more tangled than what I usually use

AE5GH4VM5Q5HNUL4EOAYRLNB7RVA.product_description: LLTGMV Rat Tail Comb Steel Pin Rat Tail Carbon Fiber Heat Resistant Teasing Combs with Stainless Steel Pintail (Pink)
AE5GH4VM5Q5HNUL4EOAYRLNB7RVA.review_text: Although I like the metal part of the comb, the plastic part is on the flimsy side

AE5GH4VM5Q5HNUL4EOAYRLNB7RVA.product_description: Beauty Bakerie Berried metallic Lip whip is a metallic red liquid lipstick with hints of deep purple. It is long-lasting, smudge-proof and waterproof. Glides smoothly over lips, It is a weightless and non-sticky texture.
AE5GH4VM5Q5HNUL4EOAYRLNB7RVA.review_text: [[VIDEOID:24bd3e1c64d63054ae7d6d4f1c8f8abd]] With other matte lipsticks I’ve tried they didn’t feel dry or crusty but this one did and it was pretty uncomfortable.

AE5GH4VM5Q5HNUL4EOAYRLNB7RVA.product_description: Marine Forest Concealer Stick, 2 Pcs Creamy Medium to Full Coverage Contour Makeup Stick, Light and Oil Control Matte Under Eye Face Concealer Makeup Kit, Upgrade Design (Caramel)
AE5GH4VM5Q5HNUL4EOAYRLNB7RVA.review_text: This goes on very smoothly and blends completely into my skin. It’s the perfect color match for me. (Yes I know it’s concealer)

AE5GH4VM5Q5HNUL4EOAYRLNB7RVA.product_description: Builder Gel Nail Kit -2 oz Clear&Pink Nail Extension Gel Big Capacity Builder Gel for Nails,Hard Gel Strengthen Set with Nail Forms Brush Nail File DIY for Nail Art Manicure
AE5GH4VM5Q5HNUL4EOAYRLNB7RVA.review_text:
I used a natural nail tip to make a very easy hombre using the pink color. Then I clear capped it to give it an icicle effect. It levels on its own very nicely

The only thing that’s kinda weird about this kit is that the hard gel acts more like a super stick polygel. Plus they give you slip solution which isn’t needed for hard gel.

AFEYVUSF4YUXHCTHB5GDRCG73JIA.product_description: Bundle Monster 20pc Nail Art Image Manicure Stamping Plates-2014 CYO Collection
AFEYVUSF4YUXHCTHB5GDRCG73JIA.review_text:
These are the stamping plates that I use all the time. I stamp over gel nail polish with konad stamping polish, Essie polish, or Sallie Hanson insta-dri polish. When you first pull off the blue protective film, clean the plates really well with acetone. Then, I usually paint, scrape, roll, and then clean everything off without actually rolling the first stamping on my nails. I find the first stamping doesn't go well on a fresh plate, so I just don't waste my time.
After doing that, they stamp fine all the time. I have found at least one image in every stamper bundle that has stamping issues. I just don't use that stamp. These plates have intricate designs that transfer well. If you find that not all of your design is trasferring, first clean the plate really well with acetone. All that built-up dried polish affects the stamp. There are lots of good videos on stamping troubleshooting, too, if you are having trouble.
I stamp with a konad stamper, and scrape with an old credit card or empty gift cards. Metal scrapers will damage the plates.

AHE5RLELYXWSMUVORWWJI47PWU3A.review_text: It's gentle and cleanses well but I notice that it left a thin slippery residue that cannot be washed off easily. If you have a Clarisonic though it could help get rid of this problem. If not, maybe use a washcloth after rinsing.

AHE5RLELYXWSMUVORWWJI47PWU3A.product_description: Pore strips are tested under strict US regulations. No Fillers, Harmful Fragrances, Dyes or preservative. The pore strips made from safe and high quality ingredients can achieve the expected expectations.
AHE5RLELYXWSMUVORWWJI47PWU3A.review_text:
"Jeff's Wife" - I've used the white name brand for years and some store brands but not the charcoal ones. These work just as good as the others, although I'm not sure if the charcoal really makes a difference.

The description photos show slits in the strip but I haven't seen them in mine, not a big deal but they do serve a purpose. There is quite a bit of black residue left over (there's also residue left over when using the white ones, the black is just more visible) but it rinses away easily with warm water.

I'm very happy with these.

AHE5RLELYXWSMUVORWWJI47PWU3A.product_description: Nail Art Stamp Stamping Templates Stamping Tool Set 2.8cm Clear Silicone Stamper Scraper Stamping Plate Guide Template 6PCS
AHE5RLELYXWSMUVORWWJI47PWU3A.review_text:
"Jeff's Wife" - I got these when they were an Add-On Item for $3.99, definitely worth the price. The stamper works great, I didn't even wash it first (even though you should always wash new stampers before first use), and it's slightly (I do mean slightly) softer then other clear stampers I own.

If you're new to stamping or not familiar with clear stampers, they are more delicate than opaque ones and tear easily, so be gentle with it. Wash it with dish soap & warm water, dry with a paper towel and clean it with a lint roller or tape. Never buff it or use acetone, you'll make it cloudy defeating the purpose of a clear stamper. When picking up, ROLL GENTLY over the image if you apply too much pressure it won't pick up. When applying the image to the nail press straight down (again, with GENTLE pressure) and rock side to side or roll from side to side. Don't push the tip of the nail into it, it will tear.

All the plates stamp great, I didn't swatch every image, although plates 29 & 41 have shallow etching (in my experience this is normal for BP plates) so the thinner scraper is a nice addition. It's not as thin as the 0.5mm and not a thick as the 1mm ones I own, I'd say it's 0.75mm (I didn't get out the calipers). There are different size images, a little for every nail size. But I do wish the water marble designs were bigger, I'm not a Water Marble Witch yet. Plate 52 is great for lead lighting or Sharpie water coloring.

The stamping guide works like it's supposed to, I've added a photo to show how it's used just in case it's confusing. I have a set of 4 templates from another brand already, there's not much difference in size or thickness of the metal but the designs are different. The edges aren't finished, like a plate with no backing, but I don't think it would cause anyone to slice their finger open unless you're being extremely careless.

All in all a great set.

AHE5RLELYXWSMUVORWWJI47PWU3A.product_description: Liquid Latex Fashions Metallic Silver Latex Body Paint for Adults and Kids, Zombie Skin Makeup, Ideal for Art, Parties and Cosplay, Super Flexible- 4 Oz
AHE5RLELYXWSMUVORWWJI47PWU3A.review_text:
"Jeff's Wife" - This is not true to color, it dries quite a bit darker, as you can see from the pic, but since I only use it for nail art I don't care but some of you might. I bought the pink back in Feb. 2015, still using it just got tired of the color, and this one seems slightly less opaque but maybe it's because that one is pink on pale skin but a second coat fixes the opacity, (only 1 coat in the pic). It may leave a few specks of the shimmer on your skin when you peel it off but they wipe away effortlessly.

If you're new to nail art and want to use this for that, I do suggest you transfer some to an empty polish bottle (cleaned with acetone or brand new doesn't matter) using a syringe with some sort of tip, an eye dropper or even a straw, this will keep the large bottle from drying out. This 4 oz bottle will last you a very long time, I still have about half the bottle I bought in Feb. 2015, and costs a fraction of the price as those other brands marketed specifically for nail art.

AHE5RLELYXWSMUVORWWJI47PWU3A.product_description: LOVATIC Teeth Whitening Pen - 2 Packs - Advance Teeth Whitening Solution - 35% Carbamide Peroxide - Safe, Convenient and Effective
AHE5RLELYXWSMUVORWWJI47PWU3A.review_text: "Jeff's Wife"- These are so good! I only wish I had the original versions to compare. I've only heard negative things about the original stamping polishes from BM so I don't own any, I've only used MdU. But when BM reformulated their stamping polishes I gave them a try and I now own all the new collections so I gave these a try too. Boy am I glad I did. These DID NOT DISAPPOINT! I don't own white stamping polish, I use Sinful Colors Snow Me White that has been open for 3 days, it works but it's still not proper stamping polish. The black I use is MdU, the absolute holy grail of stamping polishes. But I have to say that these are beyond good! This black is comparable to MdU black in every way, except the smell. These have just become my favorite! I don't think I will be ordering from anyone else anymore.

AGV2YW5B3SCKG6WV422CIITZOGRQ.review_text: I was skeptical but hopeful of these “no glue” needed lashes. However, just as I feared - they don’t really stay. They’ll stick at first but quickly lift and don’t want to stay. They also look kind of cheap as far as the style of the lashes go. AGV2YW5B3SCKG6WV422CIITZOGRQ.product_description: Crystalline sea salt scrub smoothes while softening skin with rich, supple moisture. Suspended in a base of silky sunflower and apricot oils, this emollient sea salt scrub buffs away bumps and flakes to reveal glowing, rejuvenated skin.
AGV2YW5B3SCKG6WV422CIITZOGRQ.review_text: I’ve never used a salt scrub before so I was excited to try this. I usually just use sugar scrubs as they’re gentle and they smell great. However, with this scrub - it’s very rough. I absolutely wasn’t expecting to be so rough. I had gotten a decent amount on my wash cloth and rubbed it on my leg and immediately noticed that it was causing like little micro scratches. The salt flakes are really coarse and uncomfortable to rub against the skin. It’s suppose to exfoliate not rub off the skin. Like goodness. I started using it on my calloused feet and it didn’t really hurt and made a little bit of a difference. But as for like legs, arms and things like that? I definitely wouldn’t use it on those places. It also leaves a thick film/residue. Much too oily in my opinion. It does smell nice though but overall, I’m just not impressed unfortunately. Maybe if the salt flakes were a lot more fine and not so much oil but otherwise, I wouldn’t recommend. Also, it’s price tag is a bit high for a smaller jar.

AGV2YW5B3SCKG6WV422CIITZOGRQ.product_description: KISSIO Eyebrow Stamp Stencil and Eyebrow Styling Gel Kit (03#Clear)
AGV2YW5B3SCKG6WV422CIITZOGRQ.review_text: I don’t quite have full brows - they’re kind of sparse but recently I’ve been trying the soap brow trend and filling in the brow with some pomade. I also don’t always do soap brows so the brush doesn’t get a lot of buildup and I also kind of clean the residue with a makeup wipe. The gel holds up fine, I have frequent hot flashes so sometimes it feels a bit icky but overall it’s fine. I will say, I feel it’s a bit overpriced for what it is. It’s listed at $14 currently and I just feel that’s a bit too much for this.

AGV2YW5B3SCKG6WV422CIITZOGRQ.product_description: FragrantShare Makeup Brushes Set Dark Green Foundation Concealer Eye Shadow Makeup Sets 14 Pieces [Sterile - Disinfection Treatment]
AGV2YW5B3SCKG6WV422CIITZOGRQ.review_text: I really didn’t need new brushes but I saw this set and thought the color was beautiful and different so I had to snag it. And one of the things I love is that each brush came in it’s own sealed bag which made it feel more sanitary from the time it left the factory to when it got to me. The color and brushes are just as they look in the photos. Which is great because it’s not always accurate. They pick up pigment and shadow well and blend them beautifully. I’ve had no issues! Love this set!

AGV2YW5B3SCKG6WV422CIITZOGRQ.product_description: LANKIZ Individual Lashes Kit with Glue, 14 Days DIY Eyelash Extension Kit at Home, Faux Mink Cluster Lashes, Sensitive Eyelash Extension Glue, Cream Lash Remover, Lash Tweezers, DIY Lash Extension Kit
AGV2YW5B3SCKG6WV422CIITZOGRQ.review_text: I had high hopes for this diy lash extension kit.. but just was a huge mess and lashes tore too easily. First off, when you take the lid off the lash glue - it has a tip which would’ve been helpful for getting the glue out but you absolutely cannot squeeze the bottle.. like I tried for a good 5 mins. So I took the lash tweezers this kit comes with and took the tip off and poured the glue on a old empty metal makeup tray. But what I didn’t expect was for the glue to be so runny - pouring it out was a huge mess and got on my shirt and some other things that are now stained and ruined. Secondly, the glue is black.. I would’ve preferred a clear glue with these. Just because if you mess up on the placement and get a smudge of glue on your eyelid - or anywhere - it’s a pain to get off. And you just have this black smudge until you do. It’s also stingy which is frustrating. They offered various sizes in the kit but they’re so fragile and tear too easily. I lost several clusters because when I picked them up from the tray (using the lash tool they provided) - they’d tear. I got to angry to keep going so I can’t attest to how long they’ll last. But I’m just no impressed.

AGV2YW5B3SCKG6WV422CIITZOGRQ.product_description: FRAGRANCE: A juicy mix of garden strawberry, white peaches, jasmine petals & blonde woods
AGV2YW5B3SCKG6WV422CIITZOGRQ.review_text: I just received this today and I’m elated!! It smells better than I remember too! Both the perfume and lotion are full and brand new. Bath and body works has retired some of their best scents (like whyyyy - clearly people love it but they’re just like nahhhh ugh haha). But these set smells so nice and perfect for spring/summer. It’s sweet but not grossly sweet. I’m just laying here smelling all lovely and the scent lasts a good while - especially when the lotion and perfume are used together. The lotion is so moisturizing. You get free shipping (with prime) whereas even if B&B did have this scent - you’d have to pay shipping. But I’ll be ordering from this merchant again in the future!
